questions.question: Insert null values into the 'age' and 'department' columns of the employee table. Verify the result by checking for the presence of 'NULL' data type in the respective columns. Explain the impact of inserting null values on the overall database integrity.
questions.hint: Consider the data types of the columns and the consequences of null values

questions.question: Describe the SQL query that would be used to insert null values into the 'salary' column of the employee table. Provide a sample output to verify the result.
questions.hint: Focus on SQL syntax for inserting null values

questions.question: Suppose you want to insert a new employee record with some fields having null values. What SQL command would you use to insert this record? Provide a sample output to verify the result.
questions.hint: Consider the use of the 'INSERT INTO' command with 'NULL' values
